botcomponent.description: Generate a printable BlastBox return / RMA / exchange slip as a PDF for the associate to hand to the customer. Use at the end of a return, warranty swap, membership cancellation, or upgrade once all amounts are final. The skill fills a fixed markdown slip template with the agreed values, then generates and runs a short Python (reportlab) snippet to render that markdown into a real PDF file.
botcomponent.name: slip-pdf-generator
